_doc: Recorded Anthropic native-constrained (tool-use) extraction response (spec §6.2, prov-006). Provider returns JSON-schema-valid input by construction; the host trusts the tool_use.input wholesale rather than re-validating.

messages.content: Extract the structured data described by the tool schema.

tools.name: extract_structured_data
tools.description: Emit the extracted fields conforming to the JSON schema.
